translations.en: We’re going to the castle today.
translations.vi: Hôm nay chúng tôi đi tới lâu đài.
translations.nl: We gaan vandaag naar het kasteel.
translations.hi: आज हम किले जा रहे हैं.
translations.nb: I dag skal vi til slottet.
translations.id: Hari ini kami pergi ke kastil.
translations.sv: I dag ska vi till slottet.
translations.da: I dag tager vi til slottet.
translations.ja: 今日はお城に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person plural; predicate describing movement.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb, specifying the time of the action.
Preposition (contracted form of ‘zu der’) governing dative; marks the goal/destination.
Common noun, feminine; object of the preposition ‘zur’ in dative singular.

sentences.target: Die Burg steht oben auf dem Hügel.
sentences.reading: /diː bʊʁk ʃteːt ˈoːbən aʊf deːm ˈhyːɡl̩/

translations.de: Die Burg steht oben auf dem Hügel.
translations.ipa: /diː bʊʁk ʃteːt ˈoːbən aʊf deːm ˈhyːɡl̩/
translations.en: The castle stands up on the hill.
translations.es: El castillo está en lo alto de la colina.
translations.fr: Le château est en haut de la colline.
translations.it: Il castello è in cima alla collina.
translations.pt: O castelo fica no alto da colina.
translations.vi: Lâu đài nằm trên đỉnh đồi.
translations.nl: Het kasteel staat op de top van de heuvel.
translations.hu: A vár a domb tetején áll.
translations.hi: किला पहाड़ी की चोटी पर है.
translations.el: Το κάστρο βρίσκεται στην κορυφή του λόφου.
translations.nb: Slottet ligger på toppen av åsen.
translations.id: Kastil itu berada di puncak bukit.
translations.ro: Castelul se află în vârful dealului.
translations.da: Slottet ligger på toppen af bakken.
translations.ja: お城は丘の上にあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of ‘Burg’ (subject).
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; denotes location/existence.
Adverb indicating relative height/position (higher up).
Two-way preposition; here with dative marking a static location.
Definite article, masculine dative singular; agrees with ‘Hügel’ governed by ‘auf’.
Common noun, masculine dative singular; object of the preposition ‘auf’.

sentences.target: Ich mache ein Foto von der Burg.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈmaxə aɪn ˈfoːto fɔn deːɐ̯ bʊʁk/

translations.de: Ich mache ein Foto von der Burg.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈmaxə aɪn ˈfoːto fɔn deːɐ̯ bʊʁk/
translations.en: I’m taking a photo of the castle.
translations.es: Estoy tomando una foto del castillo.
translations.fr: Je prends une photo du château.
translations.it: Sto facendo una foto al castello.
translations.pt: Estou tirando uma foto do castelo.
translations.vi: Tôi đang chụp ảnh lâu đài.
translations.nl: Ik maak een foto van het kasteel.
translations.hi: मैं किले की फोटो ले रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg tar et bilde av slottet.
translations.sv: Jag tar en bild av slottet.
translations.da: Jeg tager et billede af slottet.
translations.ja: お城の写真を撮っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present tense, 1st person singular; predicate (‘make/take’ with ‘Foto’).
Indefinite article, neuter accusative singular; determiner of ‘Foto’ (direct object).
Common noun, neuter accusative singular; direct object of ‘mache’.
Preposition governing dative; marks the source/theme (‘of the castle’).
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner of ‘Burg’ after ‘von’.
Common noun, feminine dative singular; object of the preposition ‘von’.

sentences.target: Der Bus hält direkt vor der Burg.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ bʊs hɛlt diˈʁɛkt foːɐ̯ deːɐ̯ bʊʁk/

translations.de: Der Bus hält direkt vor der Burg.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ bʊs hɛlt diˈʁɛkt foːɐ̯ deːɐ̯ bʊʁk/
translations.en: The bus stops right in front of the castle.
translations.es: El autobús para justo delante del castillo.
translations.fr: Le bus s'arrête juste devant le château.
translations.it: L'autobus si ferma proprio davanti al castello.
translations.zh-Hans: 公交车就在城堡前停下。
translations.pt: O ônibus para bem em frente ao castelo.
translations.vi: Xe buýt dừng ngay trước lâu đài.
translations.nl: De bus stopt vlak voor het kasteel.
translations.hu: A busz közvetlenül a vár előtt áll meg.
translations.hi: बस किले के ठीक सामने रुकती है.
translations.pl: Autobus zatrzymuje się tuż przed zamkiem.
translations.el: Το λεωφορείο σταματά ακριβώς μπροστά από το κάστρο.
translations.id: Bus berhenti tepat di depan kastil.
translations.ro: Autobuzul oprește chiar în fața castelului.
translations.ja: バスはお城のすぐ前に止まります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine nominative singular; determiner of ‘Bus’ (subject).
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; head of the subject NP.
Finite main verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; intransitive meaning ‘to stop’.
Adverb modifying the verb; indicates immediacy/proximity of the stopping point.
Two-way preposition; here with dative expressing a static location in front of something.
Definite article, feminine dative singular; determiner of ‘Burg’ governed by ‘vor’.
Common noun, feminine dative singular; object of the preposition ‘vor’.
